[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a small orange tabby cat facing the camera with three orange sad-face emojis overlaid at the bottom.

The main subject is an orange tabby cat with darker stripes on its head and forehead, blackish markings around its nose and eyes, and dark eyes looking downward toward the emojis, with its mouth closed and ears angled slightly outward.

The setting appears to be indoors or a studio-like setup, with the cat resting on a pale gray fabric surface with light patterns and soft, even lighting.

Visual details include a rounded rectangular image frame, soft focus around the cat’s fur, and three identical orange circular emojis at the bottom with black, downturned eyes and a frown face: the left emoji shows a slightly darker area near the left eye, the middle emoji is centered, and the right emoji mirrors the same sad expression.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a close-up of a cat with three sad-face emojis placed in front of its lower area. It appears to visually convey a gloomy or unhappy mood using the emojis.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

(There is no readable text visible in the screenshot.)

- [No visible textual content extracted]

# Notes

- The image shows three crying/angry-face emojis with stylized “eyes” and “mouth,” but no actual readable characters or words appear.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
